mapper.sql: id, detection_id, original_url, processed_url, damage_level, damage_type, confidence, sort_order, bounding_boxes, created_at
mapper.insert: insert into biz_detection_images (detection_id, original_url, processed_url, damage_level, damage_type, confidence, sort_order, bounding_boxes) values (#{detectionId}, #{originalUrl}, #{processedUrl}, #{damageLevel}, #{damageType}, #{confidence}, #{sortOrder}, #{boundingBoxes})

insert into biz_detection_images (detection_id, original_url, processed_url, damage_level, damage_type, confidence, sort_order, bounding_boxes, created_at) values
(#{item.detectionId}, #{item.originalUrl}, #{item.processedUrl}, #{item.damageLevel}, #{item.damageType}, #{item.confidence}, #{item.sortOrder}, #{item.boundingBoxes}, #{item.createdAt})
mapper.select: select from biz_detection_images where detection_id = #{detectionId} order by sort_order asc, id asc
